title: papaver dubium var. subadpressiusculosetosum
intro: Papaver dubium var. subadpressiusculosetosum, also known as the lesser meadow poppy, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Papaver dubium var. subadpressiusculosetosum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
